pages.text: Turret upgrades grant bonuses, and the upgrade item is $(o)never consumed$(). Right-click a turret with an upgrade item to install it, or hold a different upgrade and right-click to swap them. Open the turret's menu to remove one.$(br2)See $(lc:upgrades)Turret Upgrades$() for what each one does.

pages.title: Installed, Not Spent
pages.text: Example: the $(item)Feather$() upgrade un-anchors a turret so you can push it to a new spot - handy for repositioning without breaking it.
